egg.speaker: Inner Thoughts
egg.text: Woah, we are so high up! Is this giant window not a safety hazard?

choices.label: Hmmm...

fall.speaker: Inner Thoughts
fall.text:
... I hope I don't trip ...
		
		Maybe the sand down below will soften the blow. Looks like it works for the coconuts.

choices.label: Nevermind.

trophy.speaker: The plaque
trophy.text:
The plaque reads: 
		
		'In loving memory of an associate who thought they could outswim their debt.'

choices.label: ... gulp ...
Huh?

guard_blocks.speaker: Guard1
guard_blocks.text: You are not allowed to enter without formal, written permission.

choices.label: AHHH! RUN!!
I received a letter about talking to a loan shark at the top of the casino.

guard_sorry.speaker: Guard2
guard_sorry.text: Oh! Sorry about that. Please excuse my rude behavior. Go on ahead!

choices.label: Thank you!

no_leaving.speaker: Inner Thoughts
no_leaving.text: I can't leave now. I haven't finished talking  to the lender...

choices.label: I gotta go back to that office.

init_shark.speaker: Shark
init_shark.text: Huh? What is this child doing in my office? Guards?

choices.label: Hey! I'm no child!
I found this letter that I think belongs to you.
Oop, gotta run!

tease1.speaker: Shark
tease1.text: Well you're no adventurer, that's for sure.

tease2.speaker: Shark
tease2.text: You have no weapons and you don't look bright enough to cast a spell.

tease3.speaker: Shark
tease3.text: You're dressed like an elf. Plus you have that annoyingly high pitched voi-

choices.label: ENOUGH! You're not even wearing a real shirt!
I'm not from around here but I found this letter that I think belongs to you.
you're being mean [sad]

laugh_reset.speaker: Shark
laugh_reset.text: Heh heh heh. You sure are brave to be talking to me like that. Why are you here?

choices.label: I found this lettter that I think belongs to you.
Nevermind...

laugh_ignore.speaker: Shark
laugh_ignore.text: Heh heh heh. Why are you here?

choices.label: I found this lettter that I think belongs to you. [sniffling]
Nevermind... [sobbing]

letter_received.speaker: Shark
letter_received.text: Ahhhh, you see child, that's where you are wrong. This letter belongs to YOU now.

choices.label: To me?

associate.speaker: Shark
associate.text:
It used to belong to an old... associate... if you will. Finders keepers. 
		
		The letter is an acknowledgement of debt. That means you owe me 1,000 coins.

choices.label: WHAT!?!?
You must be mistaken.
Surely you're joking... right?...

terms.speaker: Shark
terms.text:
You will have 7 days to pay this debt. Every day, your balance will incur 5% interest on the balance.
		
		Failure to pay the debt in full may lead to unfortunate outcomes...

choices.label: Hold on! How am I even supposed to pay? I have no coins.
Okay, I'm going to need a small loan and a way to make money. [skips intro]

loan_starting_coins.speaker: Shark
loan_starting_coins.text:
Worry not child. Not only do I collect your debts, but I can also loan you coins. 
		Here's 100 to begin. I will just add it to your total. You now owe : 1,600 coins! Anytime you need some more, come to me.

choices.label: Well that seems like a bad idea. How am I supposed to make coins for myself?

shop_offer.speaker: Shark
shop_offer.text:
This associate of mine used to run a potion shop in town. You may have seen it on your way here.
		Since the associate is no longer around, you are free to use it and boost the town's economy. For the low, low price of 500 coins!

choices.label: Woah! Why are you charging me for an abandoned shop?
Okay, so im stuck with this shop.

town_explained.speaker: Shark
town_explained.text:
Well you see, I and my associates own all the buildings in town under the Potion Profits Inc. umbrella. 
		We also manufacture all types of magical resources, including potion making equipment.

town_explained2.speaker: Shark
town_explained2.text: You can get equipment from daily spins on the first floor or purchase them at the supply shop in town.

choices.label: Soooo... a monopoly?

not_monopoly.speaker: Shark
not_monopoly.text: Heh heh heh. It's not like that, anyone is able to start a business here at no cost. We own the buildings, not the land.

choices.label: Then why is there no other companies around?

barrier_explained.speaker: Shark
barrier_explained.text: Heh. Well you see, there is a strange, magical barrier that surrounds this town. It is unknown how it got there... heh. It prevents anyone from leaving.

choices.label: WHAT!! Does that mean I am stuck here!?!?

short_option.speaker: Shark
short_option.text:
There's an abandoned potion shop in town you can use.
		After the shop's rental fee, a 100 coin loan, and the initial sum of 1,500, your total balance is 2,100.

choices.label: Got it! I am so ready!

conclude.speaker: Shark
conclude.text:
You sure are. So make the most of it and pay your debts. 
		After the shop's rental fee, the 100 coin loan, and the initial sum of 20,000, your total balance is 25,100.

choices.label: Is there anything else I should know?
I suppose there's nothing to it but to do it.

casino_explained.speaker: Shark
casino_explained.text:
Since you are new around here, I have registered you for a membership at the casino. You are free to spin daily and play any of the games. 
		Coins can be converted to chips at the cashier counter.

choices.label: Right, of course...

shark_prompt.speaker: Shark
shark_prompt.text: What can I do you for?

choices.label: I want to pay off some debt.
I want to take out a loan.
Nevermind...
I want to pay off some debt.
I want to take out a loan.
Nevermind...

loan_complete.speaker: Shark
loan_complete.text: You really did it. I didn't think you had it in you, pipsqueak!

choices.label: YIPPEE!!! So... what now?

what_next.speaker: Shark
what_next.text:
You've actually proven to be pretty useful. The casino has been busier since you've arrived. 
		How about you stay around and continue running the potion shop?

choices.label: I don't want to be stuck here forever!
Yay! I would be glad to! I love it here!

reluctant_unlock_barrier.speaker: Shark
reluctant_unlock_barrier.text: You won't be stuck here anymore. I will make some calls to let you through the magical barrier.

choices.label: Wait, you could do that the whole time?

enthusiastic_unlock_barrier.speaker: Shark
enthusiastic_unlock_barrier.text: Great! For your hard work, I'll let you go past the magic barrier.

choices.label: Were you always able to do that?

barrier_unlock.speaker: Shark
barrier_unlock.text: Only the barrier on the potion shop side... Atleast it will give you a nice view to enjoy.

choices.label: Thats great! Thanks!

congrats.speaker: Shark
congrats.text: Congratulations on completing your end of the deal. I'll be around if you're ever in a pinch.

choices.label: See you around!

not_paid.speaker: Shark
not_paid.text:
HEY! WHERE IS THE MONEY, PIPSQUEAK! 
		I GAVE YOU 7 DAYS AND YOU COULDN'T DO IT!

choices.label: I'm sorry...
Can I get more time?

not_paid2.speaker: Shark
not_paid2.text:
I TOLD YOU THERE WOULD BE REPRECUSSIONS TO NOT PAYING IN FULL!
		
		GUARDS!! TAKE THIS TRASH OUT.

choices.label: What's going on???
